---
title: "Global Death & Homelessness Dashboard"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

# Load data
df_deaths = pd.read_csv("data/ndisasd_noep_tot (1).csv")
df_homeless = pd.read_csv("data/hmless_nd.csv")

# Reshape (wide → long)
df_deaths_long = df_deaths.melt(
    id_vars=["geo", "name"],
    var_name="year",
    value_name="deaths"
)

df_homeless_long = df_homeless.melt(
    id_vars=["geo", "name"],
    var_name="year",
    value_name="homeless"
)

# Clean data
df_deaths_long["year"] = pd.to_numeric(df_deaths_long["year"], errors="coerce")
df_homeless_long["year"] = pd.to_numeric(df_homeless_long["year"], errors="coerce")

df_deaths_long = df_deaths_long.dropna(subset=["year", "deaths"])
df_homeless_long = df_homeless_long.dropna(subset=["year", "homeless"])

df_deaths_long = df_deaths_long[df_deaths_long["year"] >= 1950]
df_homeless_long = df_homeless_long[df_homeless_long["year"] >= 1950]

# Merge datasets
df = pd.merge(
    df_deaths_long,
    df_homeless_long,
    on=["geo", "name", "year"],
    how="inner"
)

# Key metrics
total_deaths = df["deaths"].sum()
total_homeless = df["homeless"].sum()
countries_count = df["name"].nunique()

# Top 10
top_deaths = df.groupby("name")["deaths"].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10).reset_index()
top_homeless = df.groupby("name")["homeless"].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10).reset_index()
```

# Death Analysis {data-navmenu="Deaths"}
## Row
### Total Deaths

::: {.value-box style="background-color:#4e79a7; color:white;"}

**Total Deaths**

```{python}
f"{total_deaths:,.0f}"
```

:::

### Countries

::: {.value-box style="background-color:#59a14f; color:white;"}

**Countries Covered**

```{python}
countries_count
``` 

:::

## Row
### Column
```{python}
px.line(
    df_deaths_long[df_deaths_long["name"].isin(top_deaths["name"])],
    x="year",
    y="deaths",
    color="name"
)
```

### Column
```{python}
px.bar(
    top_deaths,
    x="name",
    y="deaths",
    color_discrete_sequence=["#4e79a7"]
)
```

## Row
### Key Insight

Deaths vary across countries, with a few nations contributing the highest totals.

# Homelessness Analysis {data-navmenu="Homelessness"}
## Row
### Total Homeless

::: {.value-box style="background-color:#e15759; color:white;"}

**Total Homelessness**

```{python}
f"{total_homeless:,.0f}"
```

:::

### Countries

::: {.value-box style="background-color:#76b7b2; color:white;"}

**Countries Covered**

```{python}
countries_count
```

:::

## Row
### Column
```{python}
px.line(
    df_homeless_long[df_homeless_long["name"].isin(top_homeless["name"])],
    x="year",
    y="homeless",
    color="name"
)
```

### Column
```{python}
px.bar(
    top_homeless,
    x="name",
    y="homeless",
    color_discrete_sequence=["#e15759"]
)
```

## Row
### Key Insight

Homelessness levels differ widely, with some countries showing steady increases.

# Relationship Analysis {data-navmenu="Relationship"}
## Row
### Column
```{python}
px.scatter(
    df.sample(min(2000, len(df))),
    x="deaths",
    y="homeless",
    color="name",
    hover_data=["year"]
)
```

### Column
```{python}
px.choropleth(
    df,
    locations="geo",
    color="deaths",
    hover_name="name",
    animation_frame="year"
)
```
